channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Life jackets meant to save lives could expose a killer in Florida teen’s cruise ship mystery
item.description: Two weeks after cheerleader Anna Kepner was found dead on a Carnival Horizon cruise ship, the FBI continues its investigation with no official cause of death.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prosecutor asks Arizona Supreme Court to review decision that stalled fake elector case
item.description: Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes is appealing a ruling that has stalled the criminal case against President Donald Trump’s former chief of staff Mark Meadows, former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani and others for trying to overturn Trump’s 2020 election loss in the state.
item.dc:creator: Jacques Billeaud And Susan Montoya Bryan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Torrential rains return to Southern California, prompting flash flood warnings before moving east
item.description: The third storm in just over a week drenched Southern California and prompted some local flooding but caused no major widespread damage before heading east over the mountains and south toward Mexico’s Baja California Peninsula.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2
